title: NPC Faction Casting Sheet
description: Assemble a faction casting sheet for NPC archetypes so side characters feel like a coherent world population rather than unrelated concept pieces.

en.title: NPC Faction Casting Sheet
en.description: Assemble a faction casting sheet for NPC archetypes so side characters feel like a coherent world population rather than unrelated concept pieces.

zh-CN.title: 阵营 NPC 选角表
zh-CN.description: 围绕一个阵营做 NPC casting sheet，比如卫兵、商人、祭司、工程师和精英单位，重点看世界观统一。
